mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM JOIN_BOARD WHERE DELETED = 'N'
mapper.sql: SELECT JOIN_NO , USER_ID , CATEGORY , PARTICIPANTS , REGION , START_DATE , END_DATE , TITLE , CONTENT , CREATE_DATE FROM JOIN_BOARD WHERE DELETED = 'N'
mapper.select: AND CATEGORY = 'PLANT' ORDER BY JOIN_NO DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{boardLimit} ROWS ONLY
AND CATEGORY = 'PLOG' ORDER BY JOIN_NO DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{boardLimit} ROWS ONLY
AND USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY JOIN_NO DESC OFFSET #{pi.offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pi.boardLimit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE JOIN_BOARD SET DELETED = 'Y' WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND JOIN_NO = #{joinNo}
